zh.Garlieston, Wigtownshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭維托史爾加利艾斯頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Stewart 2nd Laird of Dalswinton, Garlies and Minto於1408年出生在蘇格蘭維托史爾加利艾斯頓時，他的父親Sir John Stewart 1st of Dalswinton and Garlies27歲，母親Marion Stewart43歲。他於大約1440年與Elizabeth Arnot結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1479年10月31日在蘇格蘭維托史爾加利艾斯頓享年71歲。

zh-hans.Garlieston, Wigtownshire, Scotland: 苏格兰維托史爾加利艾斯頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Stewart 2nd Laird of Dalswinton, Garlies and Minto于1408年出生在苏格兰維托史爾加利艾斯頓时，他的父亲Sir John Stewart 1st of Dalswinton and Garlies27岁，母亲Marion Stewart43岁。他于大约1440年与Elizabeth Arnot结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1479年10月31日在苏格兰維托史爾加利艾斯頓享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stewart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: originally an occupational name for an administrative official of an estate, from Middle English stiward, Old English stigweard, stīweard, a compound of stig ‘house(hold)’ + weard ‘guardian’. In the Anglo-Saxon period this title was used of an officer controlling the domestic affairs of a household, especially of the royal household; after the Norman Conquest it was also used more widely as the native equivalent of Seneschal, for the steward of a manor or manager of an estate. In Scotland the term was also used of a magistrate originally appointed by the king to administer crown lands, forming a stewartry.

History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland, the royal family of Scotland from the 14th century, and of England from 1603, when James VI of Scotland acceded to the English throne as James I. There were many minor branches of the family left in Britain after the flight of James II in 1688, but not every bearer of the surname can claim relationship with the royal house, even in Scotland. Every great house in medieval England and Scotland had its steward, and in many cases the office gave rise to a hereditary surname. The fall of the house of Stuart in Britain, conversely, led to the establishment of several highly placed branches bearing this surname in continental Europe, which are in most cases related to the old Scottish royal family.

variants.name: Stuart
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Banffshire): variant of   Stewart  . This French form of the name, there being no W in the French language, was adopted by Mary, Queen of Scots, on her return to Scotland in 1561 and has since come to be more popular among royalists than the earlier spellings.
History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland (see note at   Stewart  ).

variants.name: Stewardson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Westmorland): patronymic from Middle English stiward ‘steward’ (see Stewart ) + -son ‘son of the steward’.

variants.name: Steward
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Stewart  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Stewart 2nd Laird of Dalswinton, Garlies and Minto was born in 1408, in Garlieston, Wigtownshire, Scotland, his father, Sir John Stewart 1st of Dalswinton and Garlies, was 27 and his mother, Marion Stewart, was 43. He married Elizabeth Arnot about 1440. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died on 31 October 1479, in Garlieston, Wigtownshire, Scotland, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Stewart 2nd Laird of Dalswinton, Garlies and Minto est né en 1408, à Garlieston, Wigtownshire, Écosse, son père, Sir John Stewart 1st of Dalswinton and Garlies, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Marion Stewart, avait 43 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Arnot environ 1440. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé le 31 octobre 1479, à Garlieston, Wigtownshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Stewart 2nd Laird of Dalswinton, Garlies and Minto 1408 in Garlieston, Wigtownshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Stewart 1st of Dalswinton and Garlies 27 und seine Mutter Marion Stewart 43. Er hat um 1440 Elizabeth Arnot geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb am 31. Oktober 1479 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Garlieston, Wigtownshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Stewart 2nd Laird of Dalswinton, Garlies and Minto è nato il nel 1408 nel Garlieston, Wigtownshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir John Stewart 1st of Dalswinton and Garlies, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Marion Stewart, aveva 43 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Arnot circa 1440. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì il 31 ottobre 1479, nel Garlieston, Wigtownshire, Scotland, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Stewart 2nd Laird of Dalswinton, Garlies and Mintoが1408年にスコットランドウィグトウンシュアイアガーリーストンで生まれた時，父Sir John Stewart 1st of Dalswinton and Garliesは27歳，母Marion Stewartは43歳であった。約1440年にElizabeth Arnotと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1479年10月31日にスコットランドウィグトウンシュアイアガーリーストンで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Stewart 2nd Laird of Dalswinton, Garlies and Minto(이)가 1408년 스컷랜드 위그타운실르 가리스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Stewart 1st of Dalswinton and Garlies(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Marion Stewart(은)는 43세였다. 그는 대략 1440년 Elizabeth Arnot(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1479년 10월 31일 스컷랜드 위그타운실르 가리스턴에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Stewart 2nd Laird of Dalswinton, Garlies and Minto nasceu em 1408, em Garlieston, Wigtownshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir John Stewart 1st of Dalswinton and Garlies, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Marion Stewart, tinha 43 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Arnot aproximadamente 1440. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em 31 de outubro de 1479, em Garlieston, Wigtownshire, Scotland, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Stewart 2nd Laird of Dalswinton, Garlies and Minto родился в 1408 г. в местности гарлиестон, вигтоуншир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir John Stewart 1st of Dalswinton and Garlies было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Marion Stewart, 43. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Arnot около 1440 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер 31 октября 1479 г. в местности гарлиестон, вигтоуншир, Шотландия в возрасте 71 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Stewart 2nd Laird of Dalswinton, Garlies and Minto nació en 1408, en Garlieston, Wigtownshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir John Stewart 1st of Dalswinton and Garlies, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Marion Stewart, tenía 43 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Arnot aproximadamente 1440. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió el 31 de octubre de 1479, en Garlieston, Wigtownshire, Scotland, a la edad de 71 años.
